江碧鸟逾白，山青花欲燃","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7GhNuUoEkaFoldpAC8NTLH7Pft/E0qv4epLJWw1NCaa","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b6084924a1fc4198b9a99f5696d7db40~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708796&x-signature=xBtcsyQ0M0zs4S2FKFf%2FygzPTJs%3D","user_id":"3658774097953515","user_name":"一月十九秋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3658774097953515","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774088038,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":26,"name":"诸神愚戏","small_url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/5577169f8045e3cc1b4dad73f4758897~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url":"http://p3-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/2757c689d84d771889d9f3037f12b7ed~tplv-noop.image"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594509721227250712","book_info":{"abstract":"【成长型】【三重身份间谍警告⚠️】【三重身份是四个副本之后的事】【孤狼无男凝】【主角前期被追，极端主角控给我退！】
——
【狂欢乐土】降临并以游戏的形式慢慢吞噬现实世界，而筑延意外觉醒天赋【扮演】，成为了第一批内测玩家。
本以为自己可以安全发育，没想到过了第一个副本之后，他竟然被人类一方认为是导致游戏传播的罪魁祸首，人奸反派。
反派，狗都不……当！
当的就是反派！
从此，筑延不仅是玩家，还要当乐土的走狗。
在行正与行歪之间，他选择了行骗。
他左手批着反派马甲，副本里自导自演，惹得一众玩家咬牙切齿，直呼遇到了可恶的人奸，乐得游戏给他连连升级；
右手加入对抗【狂欢乐土】的人外组织【方寸山】，化身神秘玩家，杀得游戏Boss片甲不留，一众玩家高呼大佬万岁。
慢慢地，筑延混成了【方寸山】档案里的S级人类玩家，同时也是【狂欢乐土】认证的头号游戏Boss。
但当终极之战爆发，两大阵营都对他寄与厚望时——
玩家们艾特出他的若干马甲：“大佬们，这次进攻，就靠你们了。”
【狂欢乐土】的大Boss搂着他的脖子：“好兄弟，人是铁饭是钢，你可不能再让我恨铁不成钢啊！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/172e0afbe82392ab1690369c55566298","author":"原李","author_id":"","book_id":"7594509721227250712","book_name":"怎么误会我是反派？那我真上岗了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#580800","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7594509761261863448","read_count":"92444","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"334247"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"143","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,灵异,反派,惊悚游戏,副本","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4b7d818a777fd28fce0cc1d01fdcb327~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779319450&x-signature=pDT51QMyrfk7MClGVGo3bXTeSV8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1394597486919848","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"46"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322072410BD902469C01174747685"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6572,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":252},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7604830749029794585","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"咋这么美味😋😋😋还有为啥我们西山大学新生群里全是伪入啊😰太可怕了😨😨😨"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770640182,"group_id":"7594509721227250712","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4372106658452483"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594509721227250712","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"73"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16218,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7601826667319591705","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"新书真的很好看🥰（没有说前面两本不好看的意思）新书给我的观感上很不错，情节紧凑扣人心弦，并且主角的形象塑造的很好（我就喜欢疯疯的）而且是长发嘿嘿嘿...总之就是非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常好看！
（老大别打我[大笑]）
